---
title: "Gui Larangeira: Agrivoltaics and AquaPV--Sustainable Food Production"
description: "Addressing the water-food-energy nexus and opportunities to build sustainable businesses"
image: /files/headshots/guilherme-larangeira.jpeg
author: "Climate Guest Speakers"
date: "2025-03-24"
categories: [Climate and Industry]
#page-layout: full
#bibliography: references.bib
#csl: chicago-syllabus.csl
#suppress-bibliography: true
#link-citations: false
#citations-hover: false
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: speaker
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 300px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://www.linkedin.com/in/glarange/ #linkedin profile or personal website
      image: /files/headshots/guilherme-larangeira.jpeg
      title: "Gui Larangeira"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Stony Brook University; Independent Entrepreneur"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
#toc: false
---

## Title

Agrivoltaics and AquaPV: Sustainable Food Production


### Time

Monday, March 24, 2025    
6:00PM - 7:00PM ET

### Venue 
Online via zoom. Please [register](https://forms.gle/65hnhJPmnYaz5utG9) to participate.

## About

Addressing the water-food-energy nexus and opportunities to build sustainable businesses.


## Speaker

:::{#speaker}
:::


### Bio

Gui is a Business Development Manager at US Northeast Region, Battery Energy Storage Systems WEG Electric Corp. He has also worked for ISO-NE, ARPA-E, and Brookhaven National Lab. He is pursuing his Ph.D. at Stony Brook University.


<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
